common.teamNames: Noura Abuthnain – Norah Altwijri – Felwah Almofeez – Danah Alsobay

onboarding.desc_0: Follow Friday Khutbahs in your language, live and in real time. Stay focused, connected, and engaged wherever you are.
onboarding.desc_1: Choose a nearby mosque and listen to the Khutbah live from your phone. Switch languages, adjust volume, and follow easily.
onboarding.desc_2: Enjoy reliable content or join as a volunteer and make a difference.

login.subtitle: Enter your phone number to continue

terms.title: Sermon recording instructions
terms.subtitle: Before starting the sermon recording, please follow these instructions:
terms.item1: You must be signed in to your account in the app.
terms.item2: Choose the correct mosque you are recording from.
terms.item3: Only one user is allowed to record at the same mosque at the same time.
terms.item4: Make sure your internet connection is stable for processing quality.
terms.item5: Sit close to the imam to capture clear audio.
terms.item6: Do not record any sound other than the sermon (side talk, noise).
terms.item7: Start recording at the beginning of the sermon and stop at the end.
terms.item8: If audio quality is low, you may be asked to move closer to the source.
terms.item9: When recording starts, the mosque status will switch to "active" until the recording ends.
terms.item10: By agreeing, you take responsibility for following these instructions to ensure data quality.
terms.agree: I agree to follow the instructions above
terms.alreadyRecording: Sorry, this mosque is currently being recorded by another user.
terms.weakNetwork: Connection is weak — processing may pause until it improves.
terms.lowAudio: Audio is low — try to move closer to the imam.
